# cardiology MCP Servers

Explore the open database of **cardiology** Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers.

| Tool Name | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| [GRACE Score Calculator](../mcps/grace-score-calculator.md) | Calculates the Global Registry of Acute Coronary Events (GRACE) risk score to predict in-hospital and six-month mortality for ACS patients. |
